MOTION TO COMPEL ADMISSIONS OF FACT AND GENUINESS OF DOCUMENTS
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael Heath for defendant and opposing party: Furniture Ideas, Inc.

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Tvilum-Scanbirk's motion for an order to deem certain matters admitted.
The Court has read and considered the late-filed opposition. Denied as responses have been served.
Monetary sanctions in the amount of $560 are to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES
Off Calendar Dec-20-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael Heath for defendant and opposing party: Furniture Ideas, Inc.

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Tvilum-Scanbirk's motion to compel responses to interrogatories and request for production of documents.
The Court has read and considered the late-filed opposition. The motions are moot as responses have been served. The Court makes no rulings as to the sufficiency of the answers.
COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-26-2006 Set For Trial On Jan-08-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
